description_long: This is a medium-sized, rectangular wooden shelving unit with a rich, dark brown wood grain finish. The front features three open shelves, providing ample space for storing or displaying items. The sides and back are solid panels, matching the wood texture and color of the rest of the structure. The shelves are evenly spaced and appear sturdy, suitable for holding books, tools, or decorative objects. The overall design is simple and functional, with no visible doors, handles, or decorative elements. Its robust construction and open design make it ideal for use in garages, workshops, or urban public spaces.
description: A dark brown wooden shelving unit with three open shelves and solid sides, designed for practical storage or display. The structure is simple, sturdy, and functional, with a rich wood grain finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing three open shelves and the interior storage space.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a solid wood panel with no openings or features.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a solid wood back panel, matching the sides in texture and color.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to the other side, with a solid wood panel.
